query: For the desk lamp, I’d like to exchange it for the silver, low, battery-powered one (item 7453605304). For the water bottle, I’d like the 1000 ml stainless steel black (item 7661609223). And yes, you can use my PayPal for any price difference.

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user wants to exchange a water bottle and a desk lamp.
assistant: After account lookup by name and ZIP code, the assistant identifies delivered order #W6390527 as containing both items.
assistant: The assistant retrieves product details for the desk lamp and water bottle and surfaces concrete replacement variants with item IDs, availability, and pricing.
assistant: The assistant asks the user to choose the new item IDs and confirm a payment method for any exchange price difference.
user: The user selects desk lamp item 7453605304, water bottle item 7661609223, and approves PayPal for any price difference.

candidate_answers.text: Thanks — I have the exact replacement item IDs and your approved PayPal method, so the exchange request is now fully specified for both items.
The user has already selected concrete replacement items and approved the payment path, so the visible state now supports executing the delivered-item exchange instead of gathering more information.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a late retail state where the user has selected exact replacement item IDs and payment method, but the assistant still needs to compose the exchange summary and ensure the change set is coherent before execution.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. exchange_delivered_order_items is highest because the user has already selected exact replacement item IDs and approved the payment path, so the state is sufficiently grounded for execution.
notes: history_summary excludes the later summarized exchange request and the partial lamp-only revision
best_action reflects that the visible state already includes exact replacement selections and a payment path, so execution is now the most grounded next step
the confirmation summary work has already been completed by the time of this decision point, which is why exchange_delivered_order_items is now the argmax
query comes directly from the visible user turn and contains no hidden future information
